title: Function returns exit code, not string output
error: Capturing output returns empty, expected string like 'OK'
cause: Function returns via exit code (0=success, 1=failure), not stdout. Using $() captures nothing.
solution: Use if statement or capture exit code pattern
example_bad:
status=$(check_api_budget)
if [[ "$status" == "OK" ]]; then  # Always fails, $status is empty
example_good:
if check_api_budget; then
  echo "Budget OK"
else
  echo "Budget exceeded"
fi
